Neighborhoods within Lagos

Click on a neighborhood to see the most common plastics collected from beach cleanups in Lagos!

Why Nigeria?

In the summary table of total plastic collected by continent-level mean annual temperature, Africa had the highest mean temperature and the highest total plastic statistic values. This was also consistent in our scatterplot of country-level mean annual temperature and total plastic. In our hexbin plot, we could see that Nigeria was a clear outlier, with an extremely high plastic collection total and one of the highest mean temperatures, making it an interesting country to look into.

Beach Clean Ups in Nigeria

We used information on beach plastic cleanups in Nigeria (specifically Lagos and Rivers) from 2017-2018 provided by The Earth Challenge, an app where volunteers document plastic pollution found in the environment.

Mean Temperatures in Lagos and Rivers

In 2018, WeatherSpark’s Lagos weather history reported data with Lagos showing consistently warm conditions, averaging 26.7°C. For Rivers State, Port Harcourt provides a climate reference that temperatures were typically around 25.7°C in 2018.
